chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-506 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application (M.A 8192/2019) 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application (MA 8193/2019) 4. For hearing of main case. 11.10.2019. Mr. Muhammad Shafique Khan, Advocate for applicant. -.-.-. Applicant has impugned the order dated 25.09.2019, passed on his application No.592/2019 u/s 22-A & B, Cr.P.C for registration of F.I.R. against proposed accused on the allegation of kidnapping his daughter. Perusal of the impugned order shows that earlier applicant had lodged F.I.R. bearing Crime No.249/2019 u/s 365-B, 34 PPC against the proposed accused for kidnapping his daughter, which, after investigation in which statement of the abductee was recorded, was disposed of in “C” class. Once the matter was investigated and disposed of under “C”, which has not been challenged by the applicant, he cannot repeat his application to lodge another F.I.R. in respect of the same incident. The reasons given in the impugned order are cogent and based on proper appreciation of facts which do not call for any interference by this court. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE Ali Haider
